prompts.name: Clear Sky
prompts.text: Set the scene under a clear blue sky with bright visibility and a clean uplifting atmosphere.

prompts.name: Golden Sunset
prompts.text: Use a golden sunset sky with warm colors, soft highlights, and a calm evening mood.

prompts.name: Light Rain
prompts.text: Add gentle rainfall with subtle droplets, soft reflections, and a peaceful rainy atmosphere.

prompts.name: Heavy Rain
prompts.text: Add heavy rainfall with visible streaks, wet surfaces, and dramatic environmental mood.

prompts.name: Snowfall
prompts.text: Add soft falling snow with a quiet winter atmosphere and delicate white highlights.

prompts.name: Blizzard
prompts.text: Create a strong snowy atmosphere with windblown snow, reduced visibility, and cold intensity.

prompts.name: Mist
prompts.text: Add soft mist to create atmospheric depth, gentle diffusion, and a mysterious calm mood.

prompts.name: Fog
prompts.text: Use dense fog to soften the background, increase depth, and create a quiet mysterious atmosphere.

prompts.name: Storm Clouds
prompts.text: Add dark storm clouds with strong contrast and a sense of approaching weather.

prompts.name: Thunderstorm
prompts.text: Create a thunderstorm with heavy clouds, dramatic lighting, rain, and distant lightning.

prompts.name: Rainbow
prompts.text: Add a natural rainbow after rain with soft sky colors and uplifting atmosphere.

prompts.name: Windy
prompts.text: Make the scene windy with moving hair, shifting clothing, and visible environmental motion.

prompts.name: Autumn Leaves
prompts.text: Add drifting autumn leaves and warm seasonal colors.

prompts.name: Cherry Blossoms
prompts.text: Add floating cherry blossom petals with a soft spring atmosphere.

prompts.name: Summer Sun
prompts.text: Use bright summer sunlight with vivid color, strong warmth, and clear outdoor energy.
